Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and accurate product info, eliminating manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a compelling, on-brand daily marketing email using scraped product data and promotional context.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces ready-to-send email copy in seconds, removing the need for a copywriter and enabling daily sends at scale.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-generated email to segmented R1 Concepts contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers personalized marketing emails daily to the full contact base without manual scheduling or design work.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product pages, featured parts, and current offers to inform email content.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content aligned with live DFC catalog without requiring manual input from the marketing team.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Writes a daily marketing email tailored to DFC's brand voice using the scraped product and promotional data.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Enables consistent daily email marketing for DFC with zero copywriting overhead, keeping customers engaged.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the generated DFC email to the appropriate HubSpot contact lists using the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the full send process, ensuring DFC contacts receive fresh, relevant content every day on schedule.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages and associated contact records.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests automatically, giving the AI a structured input without manual ticket routing.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a personalized, accurate reply using product knowledge from the DFC website.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts agent response-drafting time significantly by delivering a ready-to-review reply and clear category label for every ticket.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the classification tag and drafted reply back to the HubSpot ticket for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all context inside HubSpot so agents can approve and respond in one click, reducing handling time per ticket.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue forms stored in HubSpot.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates customer issue data from a distributed source automatically, replacing manual export and copy-paste workflows.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs each form submission as a new row in a structured Google Sheet for ongoing tracking and analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the team a live, searchable log of all customer issues that enables trend spotting and faster quality improvements.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces high-intent buying signals in real time, allowing sales reps to follow up while customer interest is at its peak.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an instant Teams message and email notification to the sales team with the customer's activity details and contact info.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates the need for reps to manually monitor CRM activity, ensuring no warm lead goes unnoticed or uncontacted.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts is currently in development with connections to be determined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to automate customer interactions and self-service support at scale once launched.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and listings daily to identify companies in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Generates a fresh pipeline of warm local leads every day without requiring manual research or prospecting by the team.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates email addresses for decision-makers at each identified business.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Ensures outreach reaches the right person directly, increasing reply rates and reducing wasted sends.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Logs each qualified lead as a new contact in HubSpot and triggers a personalized warm intro email about the 13140 Midway Place sublet.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Keeps the sublet opportunity in front of new prospects daily while maintaining a clean, trackable outreach record in the CRM.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, and ACOS.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Centralizes cross-brand ad performance in one pipeline, enabling unified analysis that would take hours to compile manually.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data to identify underperforming ads, budget inefficiencies, and optimization opportunities across both brands.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers actionable recommendations that improve ad ROI without requiring a dedicated Amazon Ads analyst for each brand.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for creators matching the input keywords, pulling channel metadata, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Surfaces a broad pool of relevant creators instantly, replacing hours of manual platform browsing.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Discovers matching creators on Instagram and collects profile data including follower counts, engagement, and post frequency.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands creator discovery across platforms simultaneously, giving a fuller picture of each creator's cross-channel reach.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes all collected creator profiles and summarizes each creator's relevance, audience fit, and content style based on the search keywords.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Reduces creator vetting from days to minutes by delivering a ranked, insight-rich shortlist ready for outreach.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche alignment, audience size, and posting consistency.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces an objective, prioritized creator ranking that helps teams focus outreach budget on the highest-potential partners.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the pre-built outreach sequences, prompt templates, and qualified creator lists stored in Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach campaign is guided by tested messaging frameworks, keeping tone and strategy consistent across all creator contacts.

Creator Outreach.action: Uses the loaded sequences and creator data to generate personalized outreach emails tailored to each creator's niche, audience size, and fit.
Creator Outreach.impact: Eliminates hours of manual copywriting per campaign and improves reply rates by delivering relevant, personalized messages at scale.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly from the connected Gmail account to each qualified creator.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the sending of hundreds of outreach emails without manual effort, compressing campaign launch time from days to minutes.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email threads and negotiation records to inform the AI's response strategy.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds every AI response in real prior conversations, ensuring negotiation tone and terms are consistent with what has worked before.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the incoming creator reply and generates a contextually appropriate negotiation or follow-up response based on learned conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Speeds up negotiation cycles by drafting intelligent replies instantly, reducing back-and-forth lag that typically stalls creator deals.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or stages the AI-drafted negotiation response back to the creator from the connected Gmail account.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps deal conversations moving without requiring a team member to manually craft each response, freeing up partnership managers for higher-value decisions.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Pulls the weekly MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matching part numbers and build the load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Replaces a manual matching process that previously took significant staff time, producing an accurate load sheet in seconds with no lookup errors.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and populates a new HubSpot marketing email with the generated load sheet and sales sheet assets, then sends it to the target list.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual email assembly and scheduling, ensuring Must Have Monday campaigns go out on time every week with the correct product data attached.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a confirmation notification to the relevant Teams channel once the email has been created and sent successfully.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Gives the marketing and sales team immediate visibility that the weekly campaign has deployed, removing the need to manually verify send status.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Analyzes new product launch data and generates compelling email copy for the First to Market campaign, including subject lines, body content, and monthly recap summaries.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Cuts email content production time drastically, allowing DFC to launch First to Market campaigns the same day a new product is ready rather than waiting on copywriting cycles.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates the email draft in HubSpot using the AI-generated copy, attaches the relevant sales sheet, and stages it for review or scheduled sending.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Keeps all campaign assets organized within HubSpot and ready for one-click approval, reducing coordination time between marketing and operations.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth data, and email performance stats for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Eliminates manual HubSpot data exports, ensuring lifecycle metrics in the deck are always current and pulled from a single source of truth.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Fetches website traffic, session, conversion, and channel performance data for the reporting month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Provides accurate web performance context for the deck without requiring an analyst to manually pull and format GA4 reports.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves SMS campaign performance metrics including send volume, click-through rates, and revenue driven for the period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates SMS reporting into the deck automatically, giving leadership a complete channel view without manual data gathering.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck with all retrieved metrics, updating charts, tables, and text placeholders automatically.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Saves hours of manual slide formatting each month and ensures every stakeholder receives a polished, data-accurate deck on schedule.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts has low impressions or rankings compared to competitor pages targeting the same queries.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Focuses content production on the highest-opportunity keywords, ensuring every blog post is built to close a real gap rather than guessing at topics.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully structured, SEO-optimized blog content targeting the identified keyword gaps, including headers, meta descriptions, and body copy.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready blog content at a fraction of the cost and time of agency or freelance writing, enabling consistent content velocity.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including focus keyword, meta title, and readability settings.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Removes manual publishing steps and ensures every post is correctly configured for SEO from day one, accelerating indexing and ranking potential.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open vendor purchase order data including PO numbers, due dates, vendor names, and outstanding quantities.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Replaces manual ERP report pulls, giving the workflow an always-current view of which vendor POs need to be chased without human intervention.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads the processed PO data into HubSpot, creating or updating vendor contact records and enrolling them in the PO follow-up email sequence.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Automates vendor chase communications that previously required manual tracking, ensuring no overdue PO goes uncontacted and reducing fulfillment delays.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs and matches them against the embedded New Availability Guide data entirely within the browser with no external API calls.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Gives any team member an instant, self-contained load sheet tool that works without logins, internet dependency, or IT setup.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Formats the matched vehicle and part data into a structured DFC load sheet and exports it as a downloadable Excel file.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Eliminates manual spreadsheet formatting and copy-paste errors, producing a correctly formatted load sheet in seconds ready for sales or operations use.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Opens Attentive in a Chrome browser session, navigates to the previous MHM SMS campaign, and clones it to create this week's campaign shell.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Removes the repetitive manual steps of campaign recreation each week, preserving proven campaign structure while saving setup time.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the current week's MHM vehicle name in the message body and sets the correct scheduled send time before saving.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Ensures every weekly MHM SMS goes out with accurate vehicle messaging and on-time delivery without any manual editing or scheduling by the team.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC customer sales transaction data including order history, product lines purchased, recency, and revenue by account.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides a complete and current view of customer purchase behavior, forming the data foundation for all segmentation and campaign decisions downstream.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into cohorts based on the sales data analysis — active, at-risk, lapsed, and cross-sell candidates — and enrolls each into the appropriate automated email sequence.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Automates targeted reorder reminders, cross-sell campaigns, and win-back sequences that would otherwise require manual list building and email setup for each segment.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS messages to high-priority customer segments such as win-back candidates or time-sensitive reorder alerts based on the segmentation output.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Adds a high-visibility SMS touchpoint to the outreach strategy, increasing response rates for customers who may not engage with email alone.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking by automatically detecting when the new session file is ready, saving prep time and preventing missed uploads.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a fresh public download URL.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures subscribers always receive a live, accurate download link tied to the current week's session file without manual re-uploading.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules send for Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistent, on-brand weekly email with zero manual design work, maintaining subscriber engagement and driving file downloads on schedule.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully structured B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — based on keyword and topic inputs.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready, search-optimized content at scale without copywriter overhead, accelerating DFC's organic search presence in target verticals.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog post and publishes it with proper formatting, categories, tags, and SEO metadata applied.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Maintains a consistent publishing cadence that builds domain authority and drives qualified organic traffic from shop owners, fleet managers, and distributors.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Puppeteer scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style videos, Bing Images for vehicle visuals, and Wikipedia/Wikimedia for factual vehicle history and specs.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Raw research that would take a producer 30–60 minutes to gather manually is collected in seconds, giving the AI model grounded, accurate source material to work from.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Claude receives the scraped vehicle data and writes a complete, on-brand Friction Friday video script including intro hook, body segments, and outro.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: A fully structured, ready-to-record script is produced in under a minute, eliminating hours of manual copywriting and ensuring consistent brand voice across every episode.

Friction Friday Automation.action: ElevenLabs converts the Claude-generated script into a studio-quality voiceover audio file using the selected branded voice.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Professional narration is generated instantly without scheduling a voice actor, reducing production turnaround from days to minutes.

Friction Friday Automation.action: An Apps Script webhook assembles all outputs — script text, voiceover file link, scraped thumbnail image, and video metadata — into a structured row in Google Sheets as the final deliverable package.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Every element of the video package is organized and accessible in one place, allowing the creator to review and publish without hunting across multiple tools.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows and audits enrollment triggers, branch logic, delays, and email sequences for gaps or inefficiencies.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Surfaces broken triggers and redundant steps that cause leads to fall through the funnel, enabling targeted fixes that improve conversion rates.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Implements optimized workflow logic for site visit triggers and welcome series based on audit findings, updating sequences and re-enrollment criteria.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Ensures every new lead receives a properly timed, relevant welcome experience while site-behavior triggers fire accurately, improving lead nurture efficiency.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts Dream CustomerIDs along with associated contact details, purchase history, and account identifiers from the ERP system.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Provides the raw customer identity data needed to link offline sales records to marketing contacts, enabling accurate segmentation and personalization.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Maps each Dream CustomerID to the corresponding HubSpot contact record, writing the ID as a custom property for workflow targeting.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Connects ERP sales data directly to HubSpot contacts, unlocking automated workflows triggered by real purchase behavior and customer lifecycle stage.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in planning stage with connections and workflow steps not yet defined.
Bomb File Project.impact: Reserving pipeline capacity for this project ensures it can be scoped, resourced, and launched efficiently once requirements are finalized.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Monitors the R1 Concepts YouTube channel and extracts data from the latest weekly video including title, transcript, thumbnail, and URL.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Automatically triggers the full multi-channel distribution workflow the moment a new R1 video is published, removing all manual handoff steps.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Publishes a formatted, SEO-optimized blog post based on the video content with embedded video and structured metadata.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Converts video views into long-term organic search traffic, helping R1 Concepts rank for performance auto parts keywords beyond YouTube's platform.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Builds and sends a weekly email to R1 contacts featuring the new video, blog post link, and branded creative.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Drives repeat site visits and brand engagement from the existing contact database by consistently delivering fresh, relevant video content to inboxes.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Sends a concise SMS to opted-in R1 subscribers with a direct link to the new video or blog post.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Captures mobile-first customers who engage more with SMS than email, increasing total weekly content reach and click-through rates.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, click-through rates, and indexed page data for all DFC blog posts.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides direct visibility into which blog topics are gaining search traction, allowing the content strategy to be refined toward highest-ranking opportunities.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves traffic metrics, session data, bounce rates, and conversion events attributed to DFC blog content for the reporting period.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Connects SEO performance to actual business outcomes like form fills and product page visits, quantifying the revenue impact of the blog program.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Fetches post-level metadata including publish dates, word counts, categories, and Yoast SEO scores for all blog content published in the period.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Enables efficiency reporting by correlating content output volume and quality scores with traffic and ranking outcomes in a single dashboard view.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword ranking trends, total impressions, clicks, and top-performing queries for all R1 Concepts blog content.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Reveals month-over-month SEO momentum and identifies which product or category topics are earning the most search visibility for R1.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly organic traffic volume, engaged sessions, goal completions, and revenue-attributed events from R1 blog pages.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Demonstrates the direct business contribution of the blog program by linking organic content traffic to product page visits, leads, and sales activity.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Compiles monthly publishing output data including total posts, categories covered, and content volume metrics from the R1 blog.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides a clear record of content production efficiency, helping stakeholders understand output pace and content coverage across R1 product lines.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDFs and extracts the attachments for processing.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Eliminates manual inbox monitoring and PDF sorting, ensuring every vendor invoice is captured and queued for stamping without human intervention.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Processes each invoice PDF by programmatically applying the Harbor Tires stamp image and Richard's signature at the designated positions on the document.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Reduces invoice approval processing time from minutes per document to seconds, eliminating errors from missed stamps and ensuring consistent document formatting.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Sends the completed stamped-and-signed invoice PDF back to the appropriate recipient or saves it to a designated output folder for records.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Closes the approval loop automatically by delivering finalized documents to vendors or internal teams without requiring any manual send step.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks and identifies prospect visits to specific DFC product or category pages, mapping behavior to the 6 Phase 1 trigger conditions.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Captures high-intent prospect activity in real time, ensuring no warm lead goes uncontacted after showing interest in DFC parts.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Receives the page-visit trigger data, matches it to a known contact record, and enrolls the prospect into the appropriate Phase 1 automated email sequence.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Delivers timely, contextually relevant follow-up emails without any manual sales effort, increasing conversion likelihood while freeing the team from reactive outreach.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Ingests incoming customer support requests from available channels and queues them for AI triage and classification.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Centralizes all incoming support volume into a single automated pipeline, eliminating manual sorting and reducing first-response time.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Reads each support ticket, classifies the issue type, determines urgency, and generates a drafted response or resolution path.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Handles routine ticket resolution instantly and routes complex cases with context already attached, cutting average handle time significantly.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives the AI classification and response draft, auto-replies to low-complexity tickets, and assigns flagged tickets to the correct support agent.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Reduces agent workload on repetitive inquiries and ensures complex issues reach the right person immediately with full context, improving customer satisfaction scores.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the monthly new arrivals file from Gerrit Young and triggers the automation pipeline to begin content distribution.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Creates a reliable, low-friction handoff point that kicks off the entire NAG workflow without requiring manual uploads or additional coordination steps.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the new arrivals file and uploads product data so the new parts are live and referenceable for marketing content.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Ensures product availability and marketing launch are synchronized, preventing promotions from going out before items are purchasable.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the existing NAG email template, populates it with the new arrivals content, and schedules the monthly email send to the subscriber list.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Eliminates manual email rebuilding each month, saving hours of production time while maintaining brand-consistent formatting across every send.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the existing NAG SMS template, updates it with new arrival highlights, and schedules the outbound text blast to opted-in subscribers.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Extends new arrival reach to the SMS audience simultaneously with email, maximizing first-day traffic to newly listed products with zero extra manual effort.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies and enrolls prospective shipping carriers into an outreach sequence, automatically sending templated RFQ emails to each new carrier contact.
Don Carrier Outreach.impact: Scales carrier prospecting without adding headcount, ensuring a consistent pipeline of competitive shipping options is always being evaluated.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Receives carrier responses, extracts quoted cost and lead time, and automatically compares them against current carrier benchmarks using the 5% cost and lead time thresholds.
Don Carrier Outreach.impact: Removes manual bid comparison work entirely, instantly surfacing qualified carriers and discarding uncompetitive quotes so the logistics team only reviews actionable options.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the current week's performance data from all three paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, and ROAS.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Consolidates cross-channel data collection into a single automated pull, eliminating 1-2 hours of manual platform-by-platform reporting each week.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Compares this week's metrics against the rolling prior-month average for each channel and generates a plain-English performance summary with notable shifts flagged.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Transforms raw numbers into actionable insight instantly, allowing the media team to identify underperforming channels and budget shifts without manual analysis.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Sends the formatted weekly checkup report to the relevant team members with channel-by-channel comparisons and flagged items highlighted.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Delivers a consistent Monday-morning performance snapshot that keeps the whole team aligned without requiring anyone to manually compile or distribute the data.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Pulls the full month's performance data across all paid channels, including spend, results, audience metrics, and campaign-level breakdowns.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Automates the most time-consuming part of month-end reporting by gathering all platform data in one pass rather than manually exporting from each dashboard.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Synthesizes the multi-channel data into a structured monthly narrative, formatting insights, highlights, and performance context to match the end-of-month slide format.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Reduces report writing from hours to minutes and produces consistently structured slide-ready content that communicates performance clearly to stakeholders.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Delivers the completed monthly report draft to the team or report owner, ready to be dropped into the end-of-month slide deck.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Ensures the monthly report is delivered on time every month with no bottleneck on one person compiling it, freeing strategic time for the media team.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Identifies contacts who completed the Amazon flyer warranty registration and tags them as a qualified audience segment for ad targeting.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Captures post-purchase customer intent signals and structures them into a usable retargeting pool, connecting Amazon buyer behavior to paid social strategy.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Validates and cleans the contact list, standardizing data fields and flagging any records that don't meet audience quality thresholds before sync.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Improves Meta audience match rates by ensuring only clean, complete records are pushed, maximizing the value of every customer added to the ad audience.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Receives the validated customer list and automatically adds them to the designated Meta custom audience for retargeting campaigns.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Closes the loop between Amazon warranty buyers and Meta retargeting with no manual list exports, growing a high-intent audience continuously and automatically.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Pulls active ad creative data including copy, performance metrics, spend, CTR, and conversion rates across all running paid social campaigns.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Automates ad data collection across two platforms simultaneously, providing a complete picture of copy performance without manual dashboard reviews.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Analyzes each ad's copy against its performance metrics, identifies underperforming creative, diagnoses likely copy weaknesses, and generates specific improvement recommendations.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Surfaces actionable copy fixes grounded in actual performance data rather than guesswork, enabling the team to prioritize which ads to rewrite for maximum impact.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Sends the copy audit report to the paid social team with flagged ads, performance context, and Claude's recommended copy improvements organized by priority.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Delivers a ready-to-act creative brief directly to the team, cutting the time between performance dip detection and copy revision from days to hours.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana projects and tasks for status changes, overdue items, blockers, or newly assigned work that requires attention or follow-up.
Asana Agent.impact: Keeps task visibility active without requiring manual project reviews, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks across active workstreams.

Asana Agent.action: Interprets the Asana task data, identifies priority items, drafts summaries of what needs action, and composes a structured update or follow-up message.
Asana Agent.impact: Converts raw task data into a clear, human-readable summary that drives action, saving the time it would take to manually review and synthesize project status.

Asana Agent.action: Sends the Claude-generated task summary and action items to the relevant team members or project owners.
Asana Agent.impact: Proactively keeps stakeholders informed and accountable without requiring a project manager to manually send status updates or chase down progress.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting, recording discussed tasks, decisions, owners, and deadlines mentioned during the call.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Eliminates the need for a dedicated note-taker and ensures every action item discussed verbally is captured for follow-up rather than lost after the call ends.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Parses the meeting transcript, extracts discrete action items, assigns them to the correct owners based on context, and structures them into Asana-ready task format.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Transforms unstructured meeting conversation into clean, assigned, deadline-attached tasks in seconds, removing the manual task-creation bottleneck that typically follows every meeting.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Receives the structured task data from Claude and creates new Asana tasks with titles, descriptions, assignees, and due dates populated automatically.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Ensures every media meeting results in a fully updated Asana board with zero manual entry, keeping the team accountable and projects moving immediately after each meeting.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: The agent pulls active search ad copy and performance metrics for underperforming ads, including headlines, descriptions, CTR, and conversion rates.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: All relevant ad performance data is surfaced automatically, replacing the manual process of exporting reports and cross-referencing copy against metrics.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Claude analyzes the underperforming ad copy against performance benchmarks and generates specific, actionable rewrite recommendations for each flagged ad.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Copy improvements are identified and drafted in seconds rather than requiring a strategist to manually review each ad, accelerating the optimization cycle.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: A formatted audit report is emailed to the team listing each underperforming ad alongside Claude's specific recommendations for improvement.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Decision-makers receive a clear, actionable brief without logging into Google Ads, keeping the optimization loop fast and reducing time-to-improvement.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: The agent reads the current Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent records including names, statuses, owners, and progress notes.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: All agent tracking data is captured in one pass without anyone manually compiling it, ensuring the update reflects the latest state of the sheet.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Claude reformats the raw sheet data into a clean, readable weekly update summary organized by status, highlighting what's live, in progress, and pending.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: The team receives a professional, scannable update rather than a raw spreadsheet dump, saving the time of manually writing a status report each week.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: The formatted weekly agent update is sent via email to the relevant stakeholders as a ready-to-read digest.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Stakeholders stay informed on automation progress without attending a meeting or checking the sheet, keeping everyone aligned with minimal effort.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification — make, model, year, and any relevant fitment details — through a HubSpot form, triggering the workflow.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: The request is captured in a standardized format instantly, eliminating back-and-forth emails or phone calls to gather vehicle details.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: The workflow queries the Dream inventory system to retrieve all parts DFC stocks that match the submitted vehicle spec, along with any coverage gaps.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: A complete picture of in-stock and missing inventory for that vehicle is pulled in seconds rather than requiring manual catalog lookups across product lines.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Claude structures the raw inventory data into a clean, formatted Excel-ready output, organizing what DFC has and what is missing in a logical, readable layout.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: The data is transformed from raw system output into a polished, professional format that Mark can immediately share with customers or use for purchasing decisions.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: The completed Excel catalog file is automatically emailed to Mark with the vehicle spec as the subject and the formatted inventory breakdown as an attachment.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Mark receives a finished, customer-ready catalog within minutes of submitting the form, turning what was a manual research task into a self-serve workflow.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: The agent queries Dream to pull live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit details.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Real-time inventory context is added to every backorder line automatically, replacing a process that previously required a dozen people to perform independent lookups.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: The agent enriches each line of the backorder report with the live Dream data and flags any parts that have no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit inventory — marking them as dead-ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: The team instantly sees which orders have a path to fulfillment and which are stuck with no source, enabling faster prioritization and escalation decisions.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: The agent drafts and sends customer-facing status update emails for affected orders, pre-populated with the relevant part status and estimated timelines.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Customer communications that previously required manual composition by multiple team members are generated and sent automatically, reducing response lag and freeing staff time.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: The agent scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all two-piece rotor products.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Competitor and supplier catalog data that would take days to compile manually is gathered in one automated pass, creating a comprehensive market reference.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: The scraped fitment data is cross-referenced against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which vehicles DFC already covers and which represent gaps or opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gaps in DFC's two-piece rotor lineup are identified automatically, giving Dino a clear picture of where new products could capture demand.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Automated outreach emails are sent to customers to gather demand data on specific vehicle fitments identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Demand signals are collected from real customers without manual outreach effort, validating which gaps are worth pursuing before committing to new product development.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: All scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, gap analysis, and customer demand responses are compiled into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Dino receives one clean, actionable document covering the full two-piece rotor landscape instead of juggling raw data from multiple sources.

Meta Investigation.action: The agent pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy — including headlines, primary text, and descriptions — across every live campaign.
Meta Investigation.impact: Every active ad is scanned instantly without requiring someone to manually open and read each creative, ensuring no copy is missed.

Meta Investigation.action: Claude scans all collected ad copy for the specified target phrases and flags every match, noting the exact ad, field, and copy string where each phrase appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Compliance or brand risk issues are surfaced precisely and immediately, replacing a manual review process that would take hours and risk human error.

Meta Investigation.action: A structured report is emailed listing every flagged ad with the exact field and copy where each target phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: The team receives a precise, actionable list they can act on immediately, with no ambiguity about where the problematic copy lives.

Resume Bot.action: The agent monitors jobs@r1concepts.com for incoming applications, extracting the resume attachment and applicant details from each email.
Resume Bot.impact: Every application is captured and processed the moment it arrives, ensuring no candidate falls through the cracks and eliminating manual inbox triage.

Resume Bot.action: Each resume PDF is automatically saved to a structured folder in Google Drive, organized by role and applicant name.
Resume Bot.impact: All resumes are stored in one organized location accessible to the hiring team, replacing scattered email attachments with a clean filing system.

Resume Bot.action: Claude reads each resume and scores the candidate against the requirements of the open role, producing a recommendation of advance, deny, or pause based on fit.
Resume Bot.impact: Every resume is evaluated consistently and objectively in seconds, removing hours of manual screening and reducing the risk of uneven candidate review.

Resume Bot.action: Each candidate's decision, score, and details are logged to the Sheets dashboard, with denied and no-resume candidates auto-replied via Gmail and paused-role candidates routed to a Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: The hiring team has a real-time dashboard of every applicant's status without manual data entry, and candidates receive timely replies that protect the company's reputation.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow steadily, with 56 total agents across the roster — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, so the pipeline remains consistent with last week's snapshot. The completed agents continue running their scheduled workflows across email, SMS, SEO, paid media, influencer outreach, and more, keeping automation humming across the team. With nearly half the pipeline still in progress or planned, there's a strong runway of new capabilities on the horizon — great momentum to carry into the weeks ahead!
